positive: A highly stylized, central composition featuring a geometric arrangement of nature elements. Imagine interlocking mandalas formed by bioluminescent tropical flora, stylized mountain peaks, and crescent moon phases. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and minimalist digital vaporwave aesthetics. Use deep indigo, emerald green, warm gold, and electric cyan for a vibrant, high-contrast palette. The composition must have clean, strong silhouettes, perfect for repeating print design. Overhead flat lay view, symmetrical, intricate details, crisp lines, vector graphic quality, centered.
negative: blurry, noise, low quality, text, watermarks, grain, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, signature, logo, trademark, cartoon, photorealistic, messy, complex background, multiple subjects, extra limbs
